hero.title: The Essence of Vietnamese Cuisine
hero.subtitle: Experience traditional flavors elevated through a contemporary culinary lens, in an elegant and refined space.

about.title: Our Story
about.p1: At Bep Viet Premium, we don't just serve delicious food — we retell the story of Vietnam's rich culinary heritage. Every ingredient is rigorously selected, every recipe refined through generations, combined with modern cooking techniques.
about.p2: Our goal is to deliver a complete dining experience, where traditional flavors intertwine with the elegance of contemporary design, creating a wonderful symphony for all the senses.
about.caption: A refined space with a distinctly East Asian soul.

menu.title: Signature Menu
menu.subtitle: Culinary masterpieces meticulously crafted by our renowned chefs.

items.name: Premium Beef Pho
items.desc: 24-hour simmered broth, Wagyu tenderloin, fresh rice noodles.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Our guests' delight is the greatest measure of our success.

items.quote: A wonderful dining experience! The beef pho here is rich and flavorful with perfectly clear broth. The elegant space is ideal for entertaining guests.
items.name: Ms. Minh Tu

items.quote: The service staff are extremely professional and attentive. Every dish is presented beautifully like a work of art. We will definitely return.
items.name: Mr. Hoang Nam

items.quote: My family had a memorable birthday dinner here. The space is quiet and cozy, and the menu is incredibly diverse.
items.name: Mrs. Thu Ha
